content_body:
Rolling Thunder River Company has entertained over 1 million guests on the most popular and scenic rivers in the country, earning a reputation with every single trip as a safety-conscious provider of high-quality river experiences. Rolling Thunder operates on dam-controlled rivers only in order to guarantee our guests consistent, predictable water flows, which are essential for the ultimate Blue Ridge rafting trips.

From rambunctious, action-packed white water rafting to gentle float trips, they have a variety of river options for you. Raft on the Nantahala or Ocoee Rivers or tube/kayak on the Toccoa River!
title: Rolling Thunder River Company
